User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user customization, avatar, and overall mission progress.

level.description: Adaptive level of the user starting from 1.

Reflection.title: Deep Learning Reflection
Reflection.description: Student reflections on 4 dimensions: Pikir (Cognitive), Hati (Affective), Rasa (Empathy), and Raga (Action).

missionId.description: The mission this reflection belongs to (earthquake, flood, volcano).

pikirText.description: Reflective text for PIKIR: what was learned.

hatiText.description: Reflective text for HATI: values discovered.

rasaText.description: Reflective text for RASA: feelings towards victims.

ragaText.description: Reflective text for RAGA: concrete safety actions taken.

DigitalTwin.title: Disaster Digital Twin Model
DigitalTwin.description: Simple grid or coordinate representation of the school's digital twin escape map planned by the student.

layoutName.description: Name of the digital twin room or layout (e.g., 'Kelas 5A', 'Halaman Sekolah').

items.description: Array of placed hazard, point of assembly, and signage markers.

Project.title: Project Based Learning Upload
Project.description: Metadata of the 'Peta Evakuasi Rumahku' project uploaded by the student.

description.description: PBL description of their home evacuation plan.

fileUrlOrData.description: Simulated uploaded file URL or base64 map sketch draft.

/users/{userId}/digitalTwins/{twinId}.description: School digital escape map twins planned by the student.

/users/{userId}/projects/{projectId}.description: Home evacuation projects uploaded by the student.
